path_check.detail: Recipe commands are plan-driven; BLS live calls are dogfooded, Census/BEA auth-backed calls return structured setup guidance without local keys.

auth_check.detail: US_DATA_BLS_API_KEY optional; US_DATA_CENSUS_API_KEY and US_DATA_BEA_API_KEY are required only for Census/BEA live data queries.

dead_flags.detail: All Cobra flags are read by command handlers or root output handling.

pipeline_check.detail: First print is live HTTP recipe CLI; no local SQLite sync layer.

command_tree.detail: cpi, unemployment, population, wages, industry, compare-regions, sources, doctor, version

test_presence.detail: BLS parser/change calculation and Census place/population parsing tests are present.
